_note: Connector-derived qty-weighted IBKR BUY (entry) fill price per {date: {ticker: price}}, post-reset (>2026-05-18T10:05:00Z). Source: IBKR get_account_trades(DAYS_30), 2026-06-09. Used by backfill_slippage_per_ticker.py to set daily_metrics[date].execution.slippage_per_ticker[ticker].filled to the real IBKR fill (not the submit-time state entry_price) and recompute slippage_pct from each file's existing planned. Same source the live recorder now uses (task 2026-06-09 #1).
